name: Red Combo LED Emergency Exit Sign With Battery Backup – Adjustable Light Heads
description: This Red Combo Exit Sign delivers dependable emergency lighting with integrated LED light heads and a built-in battery backup. Designed for versatility and compliance, it provides up to 90+ minutes of illumination after a full 24-hour charge . An internal switch allows easy toggling between red and green letters , while included diffusers and inserts make code compliance simple across jurisdictions.
short_desc: Key Features: Emergency Battery Backup: Built-in battery delivers 90+ minutes of backup lighting during power loss. Full Recharge Time: Recharges fully within 24 hours . Dual Adjustable LED Light Heads: Illuminate escape paths with two integrated emergency lamps. Color Customization: Internal switch lets you select red or green lettering ; includes red and green diffusers. Configurable Signage: Use as single or double-sided with included faceplate; optional arrowless setup for directional guidance. Durable Build: Flame-retardant thermoplastic housing ensures long-lasting, fire-resistant performance. Maintenance-Friendly: Test button and charge indicator simplify safety checks. Certified Safe: UL 924 Listed for emergency egress lighting applications. Ideal For: Commercial & Office Buildings Warehouses & Manufacturing Facilities Schools, Colleges & Universities Hospitals & Medical Clinics Government & Public Buildings
